commands: $COMPOSE exec -T db psql -U "$POSTGRES_USER" -d "$POSTGRES_DB" -tAc "SELECT status, count(*) FROM documents WHERE status IN ('UPLOADING','PROCESSING') GROUP BY status;" || true
upsert_env(){ key="$1"; value="$2"; if grep -q "^${key}=" .env; then sed -i "s#^${key}=.*#${key}=${value}#" .env; else printf "\n%s=%s\n" "$key" "$value" >> .env; fi; }
aws ecr get-login-password --region us-east-1 | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin 536573256060.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com >/dev/null

for i in $(seq 1 30); do status=$(docker inspect true-blue-platform-app-1 --format "{{.State.Health.Status}}" 2>/dev/null || echo starting); echo "app_health=$status"; [ "$status" = healthy ] && break; sleep 5; done
$COMPOSE exec -T db psql -U "$POSTGRES_USER" -d "$POSTGRES_DB" -tAc "SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='chat_messages' AND column_name='evidenceCoverage';"
$COMPOSE exec -T db psql -U "$POSTGRES_USER" -d "$POSTGRES_DB" -tAc "SELECT migration_name FROM \"_prisma_migrations\" ORDER BY finished_at DESC NULLS LAST, started_at DESC LIMIT 5;"
